prompt: 로그인 페이지에 '비밀번호 찾기' 링크 추가해줘. 클릭하면 이메일 입력 폼이 나오고, 이메일로 리셋 링크 보내는 기능이야.

assertions.name: appropriate-file-count
assertions.description: Creates 1-2 todo files (not over-split for a simple feature)

assertions.name: checklist-has-file-paths
assertions.description: Checklist items reference specific file paths or component names

assertions.name: correct-markdown-format
assertions.description: Each file has: H1 title, context paragraph, and checklist with '- [ ]' items

assertions.name: checklist-items-are-concrete
assertions.description: Each checklist item describes a specific implementable action, not vague directives
